name: @crow-b3/local-dev
description: Clone and sync all CROW-B3 repositories

scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,auth,users,products,orgs,analytics,notif,patterns,interact,chat,qna,mcp,billing,a2a,ingest,dashboard,landing,auth-client,rogue -c cyan,blue,green,yellow,magenta,red,cyan,blue,green,yellow,magenta,red,cyan,blue,green,yellow,magenta,red,cyan "cd ../core-api-gateway && bun dev" "cd ../core-auth-service && bun dev" "cd ../core-user-service && bun dev" "cd ../core-product-service && bun dev" "cd ../core-organization-service && bun dev" "cd ../core-analytics-service && bun dev" "cd ../core-notification-service && bun dev" "cd ../core-pattern-service && bun dev" "cd ../core-interaction-service && bun dev" "cd ../bff-chat-service && bun dev" "cd ../bff-qna-service && bun dev" "cd ../mcp-service && npm run dev" "cd ../core-billing-service && bun dev" "cd ../a2a-service && bun dev" "cd ../web-ingest-service && bun dev" "cd ../dashboard-client && bun dev" "cd ../landing-client && bun dev" "cd ../auth-client && bun dev" "cd ../rogue-store && pnpm dev"

author: CROW-B3
